## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`

## Safety and product review

- [ ] No credential, private tab data, or local absolute path is included
- [ ] Chrome permissions and provider hosts are unchanged, or the change is explained
- [ ] Destructive actions remain explicitly confirmed
- [ ] Chinese and English UI/copy were considered
